_comment: Real Dossier IDs only. 'mailto-contact-form' is required because a creative studio without a contact path fails the basic 'brand lead reaches out' test. 'image-gallery' is recommended because work-led studios benefit from richer visuals when actual imagery is supplied. Sections like 'hero', 'selected-work-preview', 'selected-work-grid', 'capabilities-row', 'manifesto-block', 'client-roster' and 'process-steps' are declared in sections.json and must not appear here. See ADR 0012 for the Dossier vs Section distinction.

conditional.when: the studio answers the same procurement questions repeatedly (timeline, budget bands, ownership of source files) and wants the answers indexed for SEO
